Our Mission

Careers
Why work at Fraser?

Our strength is our people, and we attract an incredibly dedicated team to support our work. If you are looking for a meaningful career working alongside some of the most accomplished policy experts in Canada and around the world, consider joining us.

See current job openings

Who we are

We are Canada’s top-rated think tank and have been recognized as one of the top think tanks in the world and a center of excellence in the University of Pennsylvania’s global think tank rankings. We are a passionate community of individuals who are driven to carry out our mission to measure and communicate the effects of government policy on Canadians’ well-being. Our motto is: “If it matters, measure it.”

Learn more

Where we are

We have offices right across Canada!

Vancouver
Calgary
Toronto
Montreal
Halifax
Benefits of working at Fraser

Professional Development

We support growth from within, advancement opportunities abound.

Medical Coverage

We offer medical, dental, vision, life insurance, and long-term disability.

Retirement Savings

We offer an attractive and competitive group RRSP.

Wellness Benefits

We offer an Employee Assistance Program (EAP), and an annual fitness credit.

Work-Life Balance
